query: Generate and validate a vtk.js mag-iso scene with browser evidence and benchmark-ready structure vtk.js Mag-Iso Benchmark Prompt The task should preserve iso-surface intent, stay deterministic, and keep the artifact contract ready for benchmark comparison.
recommendedPatterns: Use slice, volume, streamline, and mag-iso as the benchmark backbone for vtk.js eval.
Expect screenshot, console log, page error log, and a structured render verdict.
Treat browser evidence as the acceptance contract for vtk.js scene validation.
Inject the vtk.js browser bundle before any module script that references global vtk.
Build the scene in source -> mapper -> actor -> renderer order.
failureFixPairs: Capture artifact expectations per benchmark case so later eval output stays comparable.
If artifacts are missing, rerun the canonical Docker workflow instead of improvising a different browser command.
When the page says vtk is not defined, restore the runtime script include before changing scene logic.
If validation fails early, retry with the minimal full-screen bootstrap scene first.
If the canvas is missing, reduce the page to a known-good bootstrap scene and compare new artifacts.
If slice rendering regresses, compare mapper wiring and viewport setup against a minimal slice baseline.
generationPrompt: Generate vtk.js code for the requested scene while preserving a deterministic browser-validation path. Scene kind: mag_iso. Use these retrieval-backed patterns: Use slice, volume, streamline, and mag-iso as the benchmark backbone for vtk.js eval. | Expect screenshot, console log, page error log, and a structured render verdict. | Treat browser evidence as the acceptance contract for vtk.js scene validation. | Inject the vtk.js browser bundle before any module script that references global vtk. | Build the scene in source -> mapper -> actor -> renderer order. | Always call renderer.resetCamera() before renderWindow.render().. Avoid regressions captured by these failure-fix hints: Capture artifact expectations per benchmark case so later eval output stays comparable. | If artifacts are missing, rerun the canonical Docker workflow instead of improvising a different browser command. | When the page says vtk is not defined, restore the runtime script include before changing scene logic. | If validation fails early, retry with the minimal full-screen bootstrap scene first. | If the canvas is missing, reduce the page to a known-good bootstrap scene and compare new artifacts. | If slice rendering regresses, compare mapper wiring and viewport setup against a minimal slice baseline.. Acceptance contract: The scene should create a visible canvas during browser verification. | The script should end with renderer.resetCamera() followed by renderWindow.render(). | Browser evidence should include render-verification.json, browser-console.json, page-errors.json, and render-screenshot.png. | The browser console and page error logs should stay free of runtime errors. | The generated mag-iso workflow should make iso-value or contour extraction intent explicit..
acceptanceChecks: The scene should create a visible canvas during browser verification.
The script should end with renderer.resetCamera() followed by renderWindow.render().
Browser evidence should include render-verification.json, browser-console.json, page-errors.json, and render-screenshot.png.
The browser console and page error logs should stay free of runtime errors.
The generated mag-iso workflow should make iso-value or contour extraction intent explicit.
